chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.T.A. No.30 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 06.10.2025 None present for the applicants. ------------------------------- No one is present on behalf of the applicants. Request for adjournment has also been made on the last several dates of hearing. Dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Asif
